'''lasunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:drabbet|drabbet]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-s-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:drabbet|drabbet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| lasunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:læsinith|læsinith]] || [[word:læsinij|læsinij]] || [[word:læsinish|læsinish]] || [[word:læsini|læsini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lasusunuth|lasusunuth]] || [[word:lasusunuj|lasusunuj]] || [[word:lasusunush|lasusunush]] || [[word:lasusunu|lasusunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lasunuth|lasunuth]] || [[word:lasunuj|lasunuj]] || [[word:lasunush|lasunush]] || [[word:lasunu|lasunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lasufnuth|lasufnuth]] || [[word:lasufnuj|lasufnuj]] || [[word:lasufnush|lasufnush]] || [[word:lasufnuf|lasufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lasunuthu|lasunuthu]] || [[word:lasunuju|lasunuju]] || [[word:lasunushu|lasunushu]] || [[word:lasunuku|lasunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lasunuth|lasunuth]] || [[word:lasunuj|lasunuj]] || [[word:lasunush|lasunush]] || [[word:lasunu|lasunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lasunuthul|lasunuthul]] || [[word:lasunujul|lasunujul]] || [[word:lasunushul|lasunushul]] || [[word:lasunukul|lasunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lasunuthuthu|lasunuthuthu]] || [[word:lasunujuju|lasunujuju]] || [[word:lasunushushu|lasunushushu]] || [[word:lasunuku|lasunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lasunuthun|lasunuthun]] || [[word:lasunujun|lasunujun]] || [[word:lasunushun|lasunushun]] || [[word:lasunukun|lasunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lasunuthuoro|lasunuthuoro]] || [[word:lasunujuoro|lasunujuoro]] || [[word:lasunushuoro|lasunushuoro]] || [[word:lasunukuoro|lasunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
